title: RedliteMC
description: Exploration and adventure modpack with countless new structures and biomes to explore.
body:
# RedliteMC
Explore hundreds of new structures and biomes in RedliteMC. Build, conquer, and explore the world, taking on dungeons, ships, and more across every dimension. With all-new world generation and countless structures to loot, the possibilities are endless.

## Features:
- Explore countless new biomes!
- Hundreds of new and exciting structures!
- All new Overworld, Nether, and End world generation!
- Get stacked looting everything from floating sky islands to happy ghasts!
- Listen to dozens of new music discs!
- Reclaim your loot without worry, thanks to graves!
- Keep track of your world with waypoints and a world-map!
- Teleport around your world with waystones!
- Upgrade your backpack from leather to Netherite!
- Play on the same world with frineds using e4mc!
  

### Discord: [https://discord.gg/2dmzAVGGav](https://discord.gg/2dmzAVGGav)
Feel free to ping me (@redfire_mc) anytime about questions or bugs!
